div.p: connect(): resets reconnectAttempt to 0 connected: starts heartbeat, flushes message queue, resets reconnectAttempt backoff: delay = min(base * 2^attempt, max), increments reconnectAttempt disconnect(): clears all timers, disconnects port dispose(): disconnect + clear queue + clear all listeners, sets _disposed=true
attempt 0: 1000ms attempt 1: 2000ms attempt 2: 4000ms attempt 3: 8000ms attempt 4: 16000ms attempt 5+: 30000ms (capped)
Formula: min(baseDelay * 2^attempt, maxDelay) Defaults: base=1000ms, max=30000ms
